testcase.name: test_me_lower_rdl_or_hip_thrust

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected Romanian Deadlift or Hip Thrust as main lower, got: ['Sumo Deadlift'] assert ('Romanian Deadlift' in ['Sumo Deadlift'] or 'Hip Thrust' in ['Sumo Deadlift'])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_bugs_2_5_6_8_14.py:224: in test_me_lower_rdl_or_hip_thrust assert "Romanian Deadlift" in main_exercises or "Hip Thrust" in main_exercises, ( E AssertionError: Expected Romanian Deadlift or Hip Thrust as main lower, got: ['Sumo Deadlift'] E assert ('Romanian Deadlift' in ['Sumo Deadlift'] or 'Hip Thrust' in ['Sumo Deadlift'])

testcase.name: test_strongman_vs_hypertrophy_main_upper_different

failure.message: AssertionError: Plans should differ. Both have: ['Incline Bench'] assert ['Incline Bench'] != ['Incline Bench']

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_bugs_2_5_6_8_14.py:241: in test_strongman_vs_hypertrophy_main_upper_different assert s_main != h_main, f"Plans should differ. Both have: {s_main}" E AssertionError: Plans should differ. Both have: ['Incline Bench'] E assert ['Incline Bench'] != ['Incline Bench']

testcase.name: test_apply_injury_update
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_bugs_2_5_6_8_14.py:285: in test_apply_injury_update assert resp.status_code == 200, f"apply-injury-update failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: apply-injury-update failed: {"detail":"Profile not found for this user"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_change_log_has_entries

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected at least 1 change-log entry after intake + injury update assert 0 > 0 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_bugs_2_5_6_8_14.py:295: in test_change_log_has_entries assert len(changes) > 0, "Expected at least 1 change-log entry after intake + injury update" E AssertionError: Expected at least 1 change-log entry after intake + injury update E assert 0 > 0 E + where 0 = len([])
